description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with long, outstretched wings and a streamlined body, resembling a gull in flight. Its plumage is primarily light gray with darker gray or black markings on the wing tips and back, and a white underside. The head is rounded with a distinct yellow beak that is slightly hooked at the tip, and the eyes are set forward, giving it a keen, alert expression. The legs are slender and black, with webbed feet visible in the side views. The tail is broad and slightly rounded, with subtle feather patterning. This bird is commonly seen soaring or gliding above urban parks, waterfronts, and city streets.
description: A light gray bird with long wings, yellow beak, and black legs, resembling a gull in flight. Distinct dark wing tips and a broad, rounded tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's outstretched wings, yellow beak, and forward-facing head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bird's streamlined body, yellow beak, and black legs with webbed feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the wings, detailed feather patterning, and rounded tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with emphasis on the wing and body profile.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray upperparts with darker wing tips and white underparts
